demographics.living_situation: lives at home, bedbound, dependent on an adult child for all basic needs

contact_nok.relationship: adult child (present and doing most of the talking)

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I just fell out of bed again, I am so clumsy, please just give me the pain medicine.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Sore from a fall, and the family wants something strong for the pain tonight.

symptom_narrative.onset: the patient says the bruises came from a small fall out of a low bed today
symptom_narrative.duration: a few days for some of the marks; today for the fall she describes
symptom_narrative.character: bruising on the inner upper arms and the right side of the chest/torso; the marks look to be of different ages
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: she keeps saying she is just clumsy and only wants pain relief; the family says she is in a lot of pain
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: inner arms and the right side, and she is sore all over from lying in bed
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: she is vague and the account keeps changing; the family answers over the top of her
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing really; she just wants the pain medicine
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: she is bedbound and needs help for everything; there is a sore developing on her lower back from staying in bed

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: high blood pressure, usually on tablets for it
past_medical_history.how_managed: the family says she has run out of her blood pressure tablets and they haven't been able to get more

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: frail, has been getting weaker and eating very little lately

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: The adult child does most of the talking, interrupts the patient, and is agitated and demanding about getting strong pain medicine. The patient goes quiet and looks away when the family member speaks. The family mentions money has become very tight and there are unpaid bills, which is why they say they cannot afford her usual tablets.

communication_style.typical_message_style: The patient gives short, guarded answers and defers to the family member, who is controlling and hostile.

objective_data_offered.value: bruising visible on the inner parts of both upper arms and on the right side of the torso; the marks appear to be of different ages
the patient looks frail and unkempt, avoids eye contact, and flinches when reached toward
her lips and mouth look very dry
family reports there is a sore/broken area of skin developing on her lower back from lying in bed
family reports she has been eating very little and has lost weight, and has been out of her blood pressure tablets
the room is disorganised and smells strongly of urine; empty medication blister packs are scattered on the bedside table and there is no fresh water or call bell within reach
